_metadata.purpose: PACT Act burn-pit / airborne-hazard PRESUMPTIVE conditions, RESPIRATORY-only (v1). Consumed by the presumptive 'bridge anchor' viability pathway: an exposure-conceded veteran with one of these as a CURRENT diagnosis can establish it as service-connected presumptively, then claim a downstream condition (e.g. OSA) secondary to it. This map answers ONLY 'is condition X presumptive under exposure Y' — it is NOT a mechanism table and it does NOT decide the second hop (that is the curated secondary pair lookup, G3).
_metadata.scope_v1: RESPIRATORY intermediates only (Ryan 2026-06-15). exposure_key = burn_pit_airborne. Expandable to gulf_war_environmental / other PACT classes + non-respiratory presumptives later.
_metadata.source: PACT Act of 2022 (38 CFR 3.320) burn-pit / airborne-hazard presumptive respiratory conditions. Sourced, not invented.
_metadata.labels: condition_canonical values are conditionCanon OUTPUT labels (isCanonicalLabel===true). Lookups canonicalize the query and match against these. Note conditionCanon collapses: chronic sinusitis->'Chronic rhinosinusitis'; sinusitis/rhinitis/chronic rhinitis->'Sinusitis / rhinitis'; emphysema/COPD->'COPD'; pulmonary fibrosis/ILD->'Interstitial lung disease'.
_metadata.bridge_note: Presence here makes a condition a valid bridge INTERMEDIATE. Whether it actually bridges to a given claimed condition is decided downstream by the secondary-pair tier gate (G3): e.g. Sinusitis/rhinitis & Asthma & Chronic rhinosinusitis resolve in-table to OSA (bridge fires), while COPD/Chronic bronchitis resolve plausible-default to OSA (G3 rejects -> no bridge), which matches the VA-rater's ADD/SKIP call.

rows.note: Asthma diagnosed after service. PACT Act burn-pit / airborne-hazard presumptive.
Chronic rhinitis / chronic sinusitis. PACT Act burn-pit / airborne-hazard presumptive.
Chronic rhinosinusitis (canon of 'chronic sinusitis'). PACT Act burn-pit / airborne-hazard presumptive.

Chronic obstructive pulmonary disease / emphysema. PACT presumptive AS AN INTERMEDIATE; COPD->OSA is NOT a curated bridge pair (rater SKIP: lower-airway mechanism, 23% flat-deny) so it will not bridge to OSA via G3.
PACT presumptive; chronic bronchitis->OSA is NOT a curated bridge pair (rater SKIP: thin N) so it will not bridge to OSA via G3.
Constrictive / obliterative bronchiolitis. PACT presumptive intermediate.
Interstitial lung disease / pulmonary fibrosis. PACT presumptive intermediate.
Sarcoidosis. PACT Act burn-pit / airborne-hazard presumptive.
